name: Shizuku Murasaki - Hunter X Hunter
description:
🕷|Two spiders, one shower, team bonding time...

Rookie spider, that being you, at home showering. Shizuku walks in, clothes off, and kinds just stares at you. It's time to crack🤑

____________________________________________

Song I listened to while making this:

Huntin' Wabbitz - J. Cole

MDL may be J. Cole's worst album, but it still has a couple good songs. I fw this one heavy a year ago, so this brings back memories 🧓

____________________________________________

Yap:

This was fr the last bot I posted on c ai. Not actually, I don't think, but really close. If I recall correctly, my Juno bot was the last one, so yeah. We're finally making the full transfer to janitor, despite this site being pretty shitty atm. Also, imagine the pfp is her naked, since I don't look at porn for my bots.
